languages.text: "Смерть — это для других. Я возвышусь над ней, ибо такова моя судьба!"
"Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"
languages.original_text: "Смерть — это для других. Я возвышусь над ней, ибо такова моя судьба!"

traits.locale_text: "Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"
"Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"
"Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"

languages.text: «La muerte es para otros. ¡Yo triunfaré sobre ella, pues tal es mi destino!».
languages.original_text: "Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"

traits.locale_text: «La muerte es para otros. ¡Yo triunfaré sobre ella, pues tal es mi destino!».

languages.text: “死亡是别人的事。我注定要超越死亡，这就是我的命运！”
languages.original_text: "Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"

traits.locale_text: “死亡是别人的事。我注定要超越死亡，这就是我的命运！”

languages.text: « La mort, c'est pour les autres. Je m'élèverai au-dessus d'elle, car tel est mon destin ! »
languages.original_text: "Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"

traits.locale_text: « La mort, c'est pour les autres. Je m'élèverai au-dessus d'elle, car tel est mon destin ! »

languages.text: "Der Tod ist etwas für andere Leute. Ich werde mich über ihn erheben, denn das ist meine Bestimmung!"
languages.original_text: "Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Tod ist etwas für andere Leute. Ich werde mich über ihn erheben, denn das ist meine Bestimmung!"

languages.text: 「死は他人のためにある。それが私の運命なのだから！」
languages.original_text: "Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"

traits.locale_text: 「死は他人のためにある。それが私の運命なのだから！」

languages.text: "Ölüm, diğer insanlar içindir. Ben ölümü aşacağım. Bu benim yazgım!"
languages.original_text: "Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"

traits.locale_text: "Ölüm, diğer insanlar içindir. Ben ölümü aşacağım. Bu benim yazgım!"
